0.1.0.en: Initial release. Supports Audi, Volkswagen and Skoda vehicles via the official Cariad connected-car API. Lock/unlock, remote pre-conditioning with temperature and window heating, EV battery level, range, charging status, start/stop charging. Configurable background polling. Flow cards for charging started/stopped and climate/charging actions. S-PIN support for models requiring a security PIN. Debug logging toggle in device settings.
